case_title: DAVID CAVA VS. DANIEL DEDET et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-10-2004 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DANIEL DEDET MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE (SAN MATEO COUNTY) AND FOR ATTORNEY FEES. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL REPRESENTED THAT PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY WAS CONTACTED ABOUT TODAY'S APPEARANCE IN A TIMELY FASHION ACCORDING TO LOCAL RULE. ARGUED. GRANTED. THE REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY FEES WAS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HONORABLE DONALD S. MITCHELL REPORTED BY RHONDA FUNG, CSR# 4819

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: James A. Lassart, Esq., ROPERS MAJESKI KOHN, BENTLEY, 333 Market Street, Suite 3150, San Francisco, CA 94105, 415-543-4800 for defendant an moving parTy Daniel Dedet. Plaintiff did not appear.

Defendant's counsel represented that plaintiff's attorney was contacted about today's appearance in a timely fashion according to Local Rule. After argument Defendant Daniel Dedet's Motion to Transfer action to San Mateo County was GRANTED. The request for attorney fees was DENIED. Order signed in open Court. Honorable Donald S. Mitchell Reported by Rhonda Fung, CSR# 4819 (gps) (302/AA)
